name: Rezdy Tour & Activity API
what_it_does: Rezdy REST API for tour and activity booking and channel management platform. Enables AI agents to manage product listings and availability, create and manage bookings, process payments, sync inventory across distribution channels (Viator, GetYourGuide, Expedia), and integrate booking data with operations. Rezdy serves tours, activities, and attraction operators globally with distribution and operations management.
use_cases: Checking real-time tour availability from travel discovery agents
Creating bookings from customer service automation agents
Managing product catalog and pricing from operator management agents
Syncing bookings across channels from OTA distribution agents
not_for: Restaurant table reservations without experience products
Non-experience operators without guided tour workflows
best_when: A tour or activity operator using Rezdy wants AI agents to automate booking management, check availability, and sync inventory across distribution partners.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer booking data includes personal and payment information. Capacity limits must be respected to avoid overbooking.

auth.notes: Rezdy uses API key authentication in request URL or headers. Keys are account-scoped per operator. Reseller marketplace uses separate partner credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited products and bookings per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Foundation, Grow, and Scale plans per operator per month
pricing.notes: Australian company (Sydney). API access on all plans. Marketplace for OTA distribution with separate commission fees.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with API key authentication
Australian company — AU data residency; GDPR compliance for EU customers
No granular scopes — API key provides broad operator account access
Availability sessions have short expiry — booking must follow availability check promptly
Marketplace/reseller credentials are separate from operator credentials
Webhook event delivery is async — implement idempotency for booking webhooks
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer booking and payment data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. Australian company. API key auth. No granular scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Booking and payment data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. Australian company. API key. No granular scopes.
